title: COS-1 cell seeding, transfection, and lysis for protein expression assay
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"ca47g","text":"6-well plate (Corning, #3506)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"70sca","text":"FuGene 4K Transfection Reagent (Promega, #E5911)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"79o4m","text":"Opti-MEM Reduced Serum Medium (Thermo Fisher Scientific, #31985062)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"9kg55","text":"Plasmid constructs","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"6h4mv","text":"Dulbecco’s Modified Eagle Medium (DMEM) with GlutaMax (Thermo Fisher Scientific, #10569010)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"e1jr8","text":"FBS (Gibco, #26140-079)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"4f3j1","text":"Penicillin-streptomycin (Thermo Fisher Scientific, #15140122)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"4ind","text":"PBS, pH 7.4 (Thermo Fisher Scientific, #10010023)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"9968r","text":"M-PER mammalian protein extraction reagent (Thermo Fisher Scientific, #78501)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"1th9l","text":"Halt Protease Inhibitor Cocktail (Thermo Fisher Scientific, #78429)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Follow the general protocol: Transfecting COS-1 cells using FuGENE® 4K Transfection Reagent and cell lysis (M-PER) in a 6-well plate by Jailyn Izu Protocol-specific parameters: For seeding cells in Step 1, seed 500,000 COS-1 cells per well ( 1 mL total volume per well) and incubate the plated cells in 37 °C with 5% CO2 for 24 hours 24:00:00 . For Step 2 , transfect cells at 80% confluence and use a 1:3 DNA-to-FuGENE (μg/μL) ratio, with 2 μg of total DNA for each sample. For Step 3 , transfect Flag wild-type, Flag-TBK1 N455S, or Flag-TBK1 M559R and co-transfect with EGFP (OmicsLink‱ Expression Clone EX-EGFP-M11; GeneCopoeia, Inc., Rockville, MD) For Step 6 , incubate transfected cells for 48 hours 48:00:00 , adding 1 mL of fresh media to each well after the first 24 hours. For Step 9 , add 500 µL, / well M-PER reagent + 1X protease and phosphatase inhibitor to each well
creator: Christopher Bartley
